title: DEKTON 8/M Ultra Grip Nitrile Coated Working Gloves | Ultimate Protection for DIY & Tradesmen | Enhanced Safety with Ultra Grip Material | Nitrile Coated | CE Cat 2 Certified | EN388 Compliant
features: Ultimate Protection for Heavy-Duty Tasks: Designed for tradesmen, DIY enthusiasts, and workers needing extra protection, these gloves provide superior durability. The nitrile coating creates a strong barrier against abrasions, cuts, and punctures, ensuring your hands are safeguarded in demanding environments.

Enhanced Grip for Maximum Safety: The ultra-grip material ensures you maintain control over tools and materials, even in slippery or oily conditions. This added grip significantly reduces the risk of accidental drops or slips, enhancing both safety and performance during precision tasks.

Durable Nitrile Coating for Longevity: The nitrile-coated design provides enhanced durability and resistance to wear and tear, making these gloves ideal for prolonged use. This coating also offers protection against oils, chemicals, and liquids, ensuring your hands stay clean and dry in messy or hazardous environments.

Comfortable Fit for All-Day Wear: Crafted for a snug yet flexible fit, these gloves provide maximum comfort during extended work hours. The breathable material helps prevent sweat build-up, while the flexible design allows for ease of movement, so you can work efficiently without discomfort.

CE Cat 2 Certified & EN388 Compliant: Meeting CE Category 2 and EN388 standards, these gloves provide reliable protection against mechanical risks. The certifications ensure that the gloves are resistant to abrasion, cuts, tearing, and punctures, making them suitable for a wide range of professional and DIY applications.
